name: Creator audio app — live podcast highlight clipper

persona.name: Priya
persona.background: ex-journalist, runs a 12k-listener interview podcast; non-technical
persona.decision_style: asks Maya for recommendations on tech, has strong opinions on the editorial side

product.concept: A web tool that listens to a live podcast recording and auto-flags 30-60s highlight clips the host can drop into social posts the moment the recording ends.
product.target_user: Solo podcasters recording remote interviews who want to post-promote within the hour
product.known: I record on Riverside/Zoom; I want highlight detection to be 'the moment was good' — not just transcription. I want to ship in 3 weeks. Budget under $30/mo for tooling.
product.unknown: I don't know what to use for transcription, scoring, or hosting. I don't know if 'real-time' or 'post-recording' is the right call.

objectives: Push Maya to confirm whether real-time or batch processing is the right MVP cut.
Make sure cost stays under $30/mo for the MVP.
Get a PRD + sprint plan you can hand to a coding agent.
Don't agree to anything you don't understand — ask Maya to explain.
